creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported with some changes: 
- Moved to category www, since it's just an HTTP proxy. 
- You asked how to call gzip to compress manpages in a do-install target. 
Don't.  Install the manpage uncompressed, and set MAN1, and it'll happen 
automagically. 
- On my machine, fetch had problems and suggested -t or -b; -b worked, 
so I added it to the fetch args. 
- Various portlintage; you should consider installing and using portlint, 
which (guess what!) is available in ports. :-) 
Thanks for your submission.
